name: kubernetes-safety
description: Block destructive kubectl operations — delete, drain, cordon, and exec into pods
author: sieteunoseis

hooks.name: Block kubectl delete
hooks.description: Blocks kubectl delete on namespaces, deployments, services, pods, and other resources

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^kubectl delete '; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: kubectl delete removes cluster resources. Get explicit user approval."}'; fi; }

hooks.name: Block kubectl drain and cordon
hooks.description: Prevents draining or cordoning nodes which evicts pods and blocks scheduling

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^kubectl (drain|cordon) '; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: kubectl drain/cordon affects node scheduling and evicts pods. Get explicit user approval."}'; fi; }

hooks.name: Block kubectl exec
hooks.description: Prevents exec into pods which grants shell access to running containers

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^kubectl exec '; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: kubectl exec grants shell access to running containers. Get explicit user approval."}'; fi; }

hooks.name: Block kubectl apply to production
hooks.description: Blocks kubectl apply when targeting production namespaces or contexts

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^kubectl apply .*(--namespace|-n) *(prod|production)'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: kubectl apply to production namespace. Get explicit user approval."}'; fi; }

hooks.name: Block helm uninstall and rollback
hooks.description: Prevents helm uninstall which removes releases and helm rollback without approval

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^helm (uninstall|delete|rollback) '; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: helm uninstall/rollback modifies cluster releases. Get explicit user approval."}'; fi; }
